---
title: "易经 / I Ching"
subtitle: "12 category essays + 64 source-anchored hexagram pages"
listing:
  - id: i-ching-categories
    contents: "category-*.qmd"
    sort: "order"
    type: default
    fields: [title, subtitle, description]
---

## Complete Track

The I Ching cultural track is now complete: 12 thematic categories, 12 full essays, all built from the strongest formal starting point in the cultural program.

Unlike most classical works, the I Ching does not merely resemble a binary symbolic system. Its 64 hexagrams **are** the complete 6-bit word space `{0,1}^6`. Omega then adds a second layer: the golden-mean-shift constraint partitions that space into 21 stable hexagrams and 43 unstable ones, revealing a rich fold, fiber, spectral, and dynamical structure inside the traditional corpus.

Each category essay now includes theorem-level Lean anchors, so the mapping no longer stops at broad directions like "fold" or "golden-mean shift" but names the formal Omega results carrying the correspondence.

## Strongest Formal Correspondences

| I Ching Structure | Omega Object | Why It Is Strong |
|---|---|---|
| 64 hexagrams | `{0,1}^6` | Identity, not analogy: each hexagram is a 6-bit word |
| 21 stable hexagrams | `X_6 = {w ∈ {0,1}^6 : No11(w)}` | Exact count `F_8 = 21` |
| 8 trigrams | `{0,1}^3`, with 5 GMS-valid trigrams | Exact decomposition into lower/upper trigrams |
| 既济 / 未济 | period-2 orbit `{101010, 010101}` | Unique complement pair that is simultaneously GMS-valid |
| 乾 folds to 既济 | `Fold : Word 6 → X_6` | Maximum yang resolves into alternating balance |

## Category Map

| # | Category | Hexagrams | Omega Directions |
|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | 创生与纯态 | 1, 2, 11, 12 | golden-mean shift, Fibonacci growth, modular tower inverse limit |
| 2 | 动态变易与循环 | 3, 4, 23, 24, 43, 44, 63, 64 | dynamical systems, golden-mean shift, fold operator |
| 3 | 困阻与险难 | 5, 6, 29, 39, 47, 48 | golden-mean shift, fold operator, fiber structure |
| 4 | 止静与内省 | 15, 16, 20, 33, 52, 53, 54, 62 | golden-mean shift, Zeckendorf representation, rate-distortion |
| 5 | 刚健与突破 | 9, 10, 13, 14, 25, 26, 34, 43 | fold operator, fiber structure, golden-mean shift |
| 6 | 柔顺与养育 | 7, 8, 19, 24, 27, 35, 36, 46 | golden-mean shift, Fibonacci growth, Zeckendorf representation |
| 7 | 交感与关系 | 17, 18, 31, 32, 37, 38, 41, 42, 45, 58, 61 | ring arithmetic, spectral theory, fold operator |
| 8 | 变革与重构 | 21, 22, 28, 30, 49, 50, 55, 56 | fold operator, fiber structure, dynamical systems |
| 9 | 渐进与发展 | 40, 46, 48, 51, 53, 57, 59, 60 | modular tower inverse limit, Fibonacci growth, golden-mean shift |
| 10 | 明照与分辨 | 4, 20, 22, 30, 35, 36, 38, 47, 56 | spectral theory, modular tower inverse limit, rate-distortion |
| 11 | 节制与平衡 | 9, 15, 41, 42, 60, 61, 62, 63, 64 | Zeckendorf representation, ring arithmetic, golden-mean shift |
| 12 | 聚散与流通 | 8, 29, 44, 45, 47, 48, 57, 58, 59 | rate-distortion, fold operator, modular tower inverse limit |

## Hexagram Expansion

The category essays remain the main interpretive layer. Under them now sits a complete per-hexagram layer: all `64` hexagrams have individual pages, theorem-level anchors, and local source-text excerpts normalized into the repository.

The `21` GMS-valid hexagrams inside `X_6` remain the mathematically strongest subset, but the full `64`-page layer now makes the stable / fold-required partition visible across the whole King Wen sequence.

[Browse all 64 hexagram dossiers](hexagrams/index.qmd)

[Browse the 21 stable hexagram dossiers](gms-valid/index.qmd)

## Essays

:::{#i-ching-categories}
:::

---

[Back to Cultural Track](../index.qmd) | [Back to Home](../../index.qmd)
